panels.description: Wide angle shot: Count Dracula crawling face down like a lizard down the sheer stone surface of the dark castle wall at night, cape spread like wings, moonlight highlighting the texture of the masonry, eerie and horrific.

bubbles.text: It can be no delusion... he moves like a lizard, grasping the very stone...

panels.description: Close-up: The narrator's wide-eyed, terrified face peering from a high stone window, dark shadows across his brow, looking down into the abyss.

bubbles.text: What manner of creature is this? I am encompassed by terrors...

panels.description: Medium shot: The narrator cautiously stepping out of his room into the dimly lit, vaulted stone hallway of the castle, lamp in hand, looking back toward the window.

bubbles.text: He is gone. Now is my chance to find the key.

panels.description: Medium shot: Narrator struggling with the heavy, iron-bolted main door of the hall, sweat on his brow, the keyhole is empty.

bubbles.text: Bolts move, but the key is gone. It must be in his room.

panels.description: Medium shot: Narrator shoving his shoulder against a heavy, ancient wooden door at the top of a staircase, the door creaking open as the rotted hinges give way.
Wide shot: A long, abandoned ornate room bathed in eerie yellow moonlight filtering through diamond-paned windows, dust motes dancing in the light, moth-eaten antique furniture visible.

bubbles.text: This place... it feels like it belonged to another world.
